backend.changelog: No backend change in this release.

cadBridge.changelog: Zombie-SolidWorks resilience: if a previous run left SolidWorks alive but unresponsive (dead COM link), the agent now detects it before launching and restarts it automatically, so the 'Cannot retrieve running SOLIDWORKS' launcher dialog no longer blocks the next Generate. Also stops cleanly (no error flood) if SolidWorks disconnects mid-run.
